content:
## Overview
Automate repeatable ZAP scans with YAML plans.

### Why it matters
This guide turns a ZAP feature into a repeatable workflow you can share across teams.

### Preparation
- Confirm scope and permissions.
- Ensure required add-ons are installed.
- Decide how you will capture evidence.
title: Automation Framework Plan Basics (Workflow 15)
steps: Define the environment and context URLs.
Add spider and active scan jobs.
